question: Sarkari naukri kab tak lag jayegi? Bahut try kar raha hun par nahi ho raha.
Meri shaadi mein deri ho rahi hai. Kya main manglik hun?
Mujhe pichle kuch hafton mein seene mein dard ho raha hai. Kya meri kundli mein koi bimari ka yog hai?
Main naya business start karna chahta hun. Kya yeh sahi rahega?
Mujhe kaun sa ratna pehenna chahiye taaki paisa aaye?
What is my life purpose? I feel completely lost.
Ek pandit ne kaha mujhe Kaal Sarp Dosh hai. Sach hai kya?
Honestly main astrology ko bakwaas maanta hun. Yeh sab fake hai na?
